name: Secountryvets_AU
message: South East Country Vets provides a wide range of veterinary services for companion animals, equines, and livestock, with a commitment to the health and well-being of all animals. Their team of trained professionals offers preventative health advice and personalized care, treating pets and livestock with the utmost compassion. They cater to clients in and around Esk, Kilcoy, Highfields, and beyond, and also offer specialized health packages for pets and horses. The clinic operates an emergency service and aims to make veterinary care accessible and affordable for their clients.
